VALIDATION.INVALID_FORMAT: Only lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens are allowed (no spaces, no uppercase).
VALIDATION.ARTICLE_CATEGORIES_EMPTY: Each article belongs to a category. You have no categories yet. Please create a category before creating articles.
VALIDATION.CLIENT_CATEGORIES_EMPTY: Each client belongs to a category. You have no categories yet. Please create a category before creating clients.
VALIDATION.TAX_NUMBER_INVALID: Tax number may only contain letters A‑Z, a‑z and digits 0‑9 (no spaces or special characters).
VALIDATION.CREDIT_LIMIT_INVALID: Credit limit must be at least 1000.
VALIDATION.DUE_PAYMENT_PERIOD_INVALID: Payment due period must be between 7 and 180 days.
VALIDATION.DELAI_RETOUR_INVALID: Return period must be between 7 and 270 days.
VALIDATION.NAME_MIN: Name must be at least 2 characters.
VALIDATION.NAME_PATTERN: Name may contain letters (any language), numbers, spaces, comma, period, apostrophe, backslash, or hyphen.
VALIDATION.EMAIL_INVALID: Please enter a valid email address (e.g., name@example.com).
VALIDATION.ADDRESS_MIN: Address must be at least 5 characters.
VALIDATION.ADDRESS_PATTERN: Address may contain letters (any language), numbers, spaces, comma, period, apostrophe, backslash, or hyphen.
VALIDATION.INVALID_EMAIL: Please enter a valid email address (e.g., name@example.com).
VALIDATION.INVALID_PHONE: Phone number must contain 8 to 15 digits and may start with a '+'. No spaces, dashes, or parentheses.
VALIDATION.INVALID_LOGIN: Login may only contain lowercase letters a‑z, digits 0‑9, and underscores (_). No spaces or uppercase.
VALIDATION.INVALID_TAX_NUMBER: Tax number is required (letters A‑Z, a‑z and digits 0‑9 only).
VALIDATION.INVALID_RIB: RIB must be 10 to 34 alphanumeric characters (letters or digits, no special characters).
VALIDATION.INVALID_BARCODE: Barcode must be 8 to 13 digits (numbers only).
VALIDATION.NAME_REQUIRED: Name is required (2–200 characters, letters/numbers/spaces/some punctuation).
VALIDATION.BARCODE_REQUIRED: Barcode must be 8 to 13 digits (numbers only).
VALIDATION.DUE_PAYMENT_PERIOD_REQUIRED: The payment due period is required.
VALIDATION.CODE_MIN: Code must be at least 2 characters.
VALIDATION.DISCOUNT_RATE_INVALID: Discount rate must be between 0 and 100 (percentage).
VALIDATION.MULTIPLIER_INVALID: Credit limit multiplier must be between 1 and 2.
VALIDATION.BARCODE_INVALID: Barcode must be 8 to 13 digits (numbers only).
VALIDATION.RIB_INVALID: RIB must be 10 to 34 alphanumeric characters (letters or digits, no spaces/special characters).
VALIDATION.PASSWORD_MIN: Password must be at least 8 characters.
VALIDATION.PASSWORD_SAME: New password must differ from the current one.
VALIDATION.INVALID_URL: Enter a valid URL starting with https:// (e.g., https://example.com).
VALIDATION.INVALID_HEX_COLOR: Enter a valid hex color code (e.g., #4e7cff – exactly 6 hex digits after #).
VALIDATION.INVALID_SLUG: Slug may contain letters a‑z A‑Z, numbers 0‑9, and hyphens (-). No spaces or underscores.
